opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: No booking tool detected on site despite offering 24/7 emergency plumbing across 9 Treasure Valley cities.
opportunities.observation: After-hours emergency calls with no self-serve booking likely convert to competitors with instant confirmation.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI-powered scheduling widget tied to service area and job type for 24/7 self-booking.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected; phone-first contact with zero digital lead tracking infrastructure.
opportunities.observation: 20 years of customer calls leave no retrievable data, making every missed call a permanently lost lead.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call recording with auto-transcription and CRM capture to log every inbound Boise-area inquiry.

opportunities.label: Dormant Customer Reactivation
opportunities.signal: 20-year-old business with only 143 reviews signals a large silent customer base never re-engaged.
opportunities.observation: Thousands of past Treasure Valley customers receive no outreach, leaving repeat and referral revenue untapped.
opportunities.fix: Use AI to segment past customers by job type and trigger personalized reactivation offers for seasonal plumbing needs.
